purpose: Issue-level execution units. Audits create suspected issues; validation promotes issues into fixable work.
rules: Free audit output may create suspected issues only.
Suspected issues require confidence and validation before fix execution.
No issue may move to fix_in_progress unless confidence_gate.status is pass or human_override is recorded.

units.title: Recovered merchant value has not been converted into Stafford revenue.
units.recommended_fix: Follow up on proposal and close payment before delivery execution.
units.known_risk: Recovered revenue is proof of value, not proof of willingness to pay.
